base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of chain_vfx — a effect_layer from 1991 puyo puyo. Chain-combo VFX — colored bursts scaling with chain-length. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chain-combo VFX — colored bursts scaling with chain-length; 'FEVER' chain text
